description: Letter fragment from [...] b. Mūsā to sent to Abū l-Ḥasan Ṣedaqa b. Nissim. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th century. Might be the same addressee as T-S 10J19.10 (PGPID 2929); it's tempting to read the sender's name here as Benaya b. Mūsā (sender of T-S 10J19.10), but the hand and spelling look different.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
